title: Three men reported a close encounter with a UFO in a quarry in Votorantim-SP [1974]

text_preview:
MAY 28th, 1974. In the Pedreira da “Placa” region, in Vila Santa Helena, in the city of Votorantim, State of São Paulo, three people reported the sighting of a UFO. Witnesses: Jaime Belizário. Salvador Pinto da Silva. Mauro Bulgari.

## Translation of the 3 Reports given to the local Police Department:

## Jaime Belizário:

“When he was “working as a truck driver in the “Placa” Quarry in Santa Helena, about 11:10 pm, his colleague Rafael asked him to come see a strange object. Later, his colleague Mario was also warned and then the three of them began to wait for the object to appear. The witn
summary: Three quarry workers in Votorantim gave police statements on May 28 1974 about a circular craft with green, red and yellow lights hovering 100 m overhead that emitted a turbine sound.
